questions.question: Which ingest schema do Langfuse, Phoenix, and OpenLLMetry converge on?
options: OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions over OTLP HTTP

questions.question: Why separate ClickHouse and Postgres in the storage tier?
options: ClickHouse handles columnar analytics over spans while Postgres holds users, sessions, and app metadata
Postgres is faster for span ingest
They are interchangeable and one is chosen at random

questions.question: What does the tail-sampling processor in the OpenTelemetry Collector do?
options: Decides whether to keep a trace after it completes, using rules like keep errors plus sample successes

questions.question: How does the dashboard detect drift across weeks?
options: Computes PSI or KL divergence on pooled prompt embeddings and watches eval-score trends

questions.question: What is the deliverable's MTTR target on an injected PII-leak regression?
options: Under 5 minutes from bug deployed to Slack alert

questions.question: Which SDK families must produce canonical GenAI spans to meet the trace-coverage rubric?
options: At least six: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google GenAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and vLLM

questions.question: How are evaluation results linked back to the original LLM call?
options: As a separate Postgres table with no trace ID
As eval spans written as children of the parent trace in ClickHouse
